panels.description: Reporting node count split by role (liaison / data).

targets.expr: count(banyandb_system_up_time{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}) by (container_name)

panels.title: Nodes by Role

panels.description: Total CPU cores across the selected nodes.

targets.expr: sum(banyandb_system_cpu_num{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"})

panels.title: Total CPU Cores

panels.description: Total used physical memory across the selected nodes.

targets.expr: sum(banyandb_system_memory_state{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod",kind="used"})

panels.title: Total Memory Used

panels.description: Total used disk across the selected nodes and all storage paths.

targets.expr: sum(banyandb_system_disk{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod",kind="used"})

panels.title: Total Disk Used

panels.description: Per-node health snapshot: role, uptime, CPU cores used, RSS, system memory %, and disk % (across all paths).

targets.expr: banyandb_system_up_time{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}
sum(rate(process_cpu_seconds_total{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])) by (pod_name)
sum(process_resident_memory_bytes{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}) by (pod_name)
max(banyandb_system_memory_state{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod",kind="used_percent"}) by (pod_name)

max by (pod_name) (  banyandb_system_disk{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod",kind="used"}  / on (pod_name, path)   banyandb_system_disk{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod",kind="total"})

panels.title: Per-node Health

panels.description: Streaming pod-to-pod flows (excludes tier-migration edges; see the Migration Flows panel below for those). Each row is one directed source→target per (group, operation). Pub side is the publisher container; Sub side is the receiver. Units are per-second (rate over $__range). Pub msg/s and Sub msg/s should match side-to-side; a populated Pub cell with an empty Sub cell is signal — an uninstrumented side or missing scrape target. p99 latencies are histogram-quantile over the visible window. Errors and bytes are also per-second.

targets.expr: sum by (source, target, operation) (label_replace(label_replace(rate(banyandb_queue_pub_total_finished{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__range]) or rate(banyandb_queue_pub_total_finished{job=~"$job", remote_role=~"$role", remote_node=~"($pod)\\..*"}[$__range]), "source", "$1", "pod_name", "(.*)"), "target", "$1", "remote_node", "([^.:]+).*"))

sum by (source, target, operation) (label_replace(label_replace(rate(banyandb_queue_sub_total_started{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod", remote_role!~"lifecycle"}[$__range]) or rate(banyandb_queue_sub_total_started{job=~"$job", remote_role=~"$role", remote_node=~"($pod)\\..*", remote_role!~"lifecycle"}[$__range]), "source", "$1", "remote_node", "([^.:]+).*"), "target", "$1", "pod_name", "(.*)"))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, source, target, operation) (label_replace(label_replace(rate(banyandb_queue_pub_total_latency_bucket{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__range]) or rate(banyandb_queue_pub_total_latency_bucket{job=~"$job", remote_role=~"$role", remote_node=~"($pod)\\..*"}[$__range]), "source", "$1", "pod_name", "(.*)"), "target", "$1", "remote_node", "([^.:]+).*")))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, source, target, operation) (label_replace(label_replace(rate(banyandb_queue_sub_total_latency_bucket{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod", remote_role!~"lifecycle"}[$__range]) or rate(banyandb_queue_sub_total_latency_bucket{job=~"$job", remote_role=~"$role", remote_node=~"($pod)\\..*", remote_role!~"lifecycle"}[$__range]), "source", "$1", "remote_node", "([^.:]+).*"), "target", "$1", "pod_name", "(.*)")))

sum by (source, target, operation) (label_replace(label_replace(rate(banyandb_queue_pub_total_err{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__range]) or rate(banyandb_queue_pub_total_err{job=~"$job", remote_role=~"$role", remote_node=~"($pod)\\..*"}[$__range]), "source", "$1", "pod_name", "(.*)"), "target", "$1", "remote_node", "([^.:]+).*"))

sum by (source, target, operation) (label_replace(label_replace(rate(banyandb_queue_sub_total_err{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod", remote_role!~"lifecycle"}[$__range]) or rate(banyandb_queue_sub_total_err{job=~"$job", remote_role=~"$role", remote_node=~"($pod)\\..*", remote_role!~"lifecycle"}[$__range]), "source", "$1", "remote_node", "([^.:]+).*"), "target", "$1", "pod_name", "(.*)"))

sum by (source, target, operation) (label_replace(label_replace(rate(banyandb_queue_pub_sent_bytes{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__range]) or rate(banyandb_queue_pub_sent_bytes{job=~"$job", remote_role=~"$role", remote_node=~"($pod)\\..*"}[$__range]), "source", "$1", "pod_name", "(.*)"), "target", "$1", "remote_node", "([^.:]+).*"))

sum by (source, target, operation) (label_replace(label_replace(rate(banyandb_queue_sub_received_bytes{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod", remote_role!~"lifecycle"}[$__range]) or rate(banyandb_queue_sub_received_bytes{job=~"$job", remote_role=~"$role", remote_node=~"($pod)\\..*", remote_role!~"lifecycle"}[$__range]), "source", "$1", "remote_node", "([^.:]+).*"), "target", "$1", "pod_name", "(.*)"))

panels.title: Flows — Publisher vs Subscriber View

panels.description: Cross-tier lifecycle migration flows (hot→warm, warm→cold). Each row is one directed source→target per (group, operation). Pub side is the lifecycle sidecar inside the SOURCE data pod (publishes via banyandb_lifecycle_migration_*); Sub side is the data pod RECEIVING (records via banyandb_queue_sub_total_started{remote_role="lifecycle"}). Counts/bytes/errors are per-day (rate × 86400) because tier migration is a daily-batch workload and an instant per-second rate is structurally zero 99% of the time. Pub msg/day and Sub msg/day should match side-to-side. Latencies are p99 over the visible time range, NOT per-day — they are time-domain quantiles, not rates.

targets.expr: sum by (source, target, operation) (label_replace(label_replace(rate(banyandb_lifecycle_migration_total_finished{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__range]) * 86400 or rate(banyandb_lifecycle_migration_total_finished{job=~"$job", remote_role=~"$role", remote_node=~"($pod)\\..*"}[$__range]) * 86400, "source", "$1", "pod_name", "(.*)"), "target", "$1", "remote_node", "([^.:]+).*"))

sum by (source, target, operation) (label_replace(label_replace(rate(banyandb_queue_sub_total_started{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod", remote_role="lifecycle"}[$__range]) * 86400 or rate(banyandb_queue_sub_total_started{job=~"$job", remote_role="lifecycle", remote_node=~"($pod)\\..*"}[$__range]) * 86400, "source", "$1", "remote_node", "([^.:]+).*"), "target", "$1", "pod_name", "(.*)"))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, source, target, operation) (label_replace(label_replace(rate(banyandb_lifecycle_migration_total_latency_bucket{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__range]) or rate(banyandb_lifecycle_migration_total_latency_bucket{job=~"$job", remote_role=~"$role", remote_node=~"($pod)\\..*"}[$__range]), "source", "$1", "pod_name", "(.*)"), "target", "$1", "remote_node", "([^.:]+).*")))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, source, target, operation) (label_replace(label_replace(rate(banyandb_queue_sub_total_latency_bucket{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod", remote_role="lifecycle"}[$__range]) or rate(banyandb_queue_sub_total_latency_bucket{job=~"$job", remote_role="lifecycle", remote_node=~"($pod)\\..*"}[$__range]), "source", "$1", "remote_node", "([^.:]+).*"), "target", "$1", "pod_name", "(.*)")))

sum by (source, target, operation) (label_replace(label_replace(rate(banyandb_lifecycle_migration_total_err{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__range]) * 86400 or rate(banyandb_lifecycle_migration_total_err{job=~"$job", remote_role=~"$role", remote_node=~"($pod)\\..*"}[$__range]) * 86400, "source", "$1", "pod_name", "(.*)"), "target", "$1", "remote_node", "([^.:]+).*"))

sum by (source, target, operation) (label_replace(label_replace(rate(banyandb_queue_sub_total_err{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod", remote_role="lifecycle"}[$__range]) * 86400 or rate(banyandb_queue_sub_total_err{job=~"$job", remote_role="lifecycle", remote_node=~"($pod)\\..*"}[$__range]) * 86400, "source", "$1", "remote_node", "([^.:]+).*"), "target", "$1", "pod_name", "(.*)"))

sum by (source, target, operation) (label_replace(label_replace(rate(banyandb_lifecycle_migration_sent_bytes{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__range]) * 86400 or rate(banyandb_lifecycle_migration_sent_bytes{job=~"$job", remote_role=~"$role", remote_node=~"($pod)\\..*"}[$__range]) * 86400, "source", "$1", "pod_name", "(.*)"), "target", "$1", "remote_node", "([^.:]+).*"))

sum by (source, target, operation) (label_replace(label_replace(rate(banyandb_queue_sub_received_bytes{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod", remote_role="lifecycle"}[$__range]) * 86400 or rate(banyandb_queue_sub_received_bytes{job=~"$job", remote_role="lifecycle", remote_node=~"($pod)\\..*"}[$__range]) * 86400, "source", "$1", "remote_node", "([^.:]+).*"), "target", "$1", "pod_name", "(.*)"))

panels.title: Migration Flows — Tier Migrations (lifecycle)

panels.description: CPU cores used per node (rate of process_cpu_seconds_total).

targets.expr: sum(rate(process_cpu_seconds_total{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])) by (pod_name)

panels.title: CPU Usage

targets.expr: max by (pod_name) (max_over_time(process_resident_memory_bytes{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.description: System memory used percent per node (from kind=used_percent).

targets.expr: max(banyandb_system_memory_state{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod",kind="used_percent"}) by (pod_name)

panels.title: System Memory %

panels.description: Disk used / total per node (aggregated across all storage paths).

targets.expr: sum(banyandb_system_disk{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod",kind="used"}) by (pod_name) / sum(banyandb_system_disk{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod",kind="total"}) by (pod_name)

panels.title: Disk Usage %

targets.expr: sum(rate(banyandb_system_net_state{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod",kind="bytes_recv"}[$__rate_interval])) by (pod_name, name)
sum(rate(banyandb_system_net_state{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod",kind="bytes_sent"}[$__rate_interval])) by (pod_name, name)

panels.description: On-disk usage per node and storage path.

targets.expr: sum(banyandb_system_disk{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod",kind="used"}) by (pod_name, path)

panels.title: Disk Used by Path

panels.description: Disk capacity per node and storage path.

targets.expr: sum(banyandb_system_disk{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod",kind="total"}) by (pod_name, path)

panels.title: Disk Total by Path

panels.description: Disk used percent per node and storage path.

targets.expr: sum(banyandb_system_disk{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod",kind="used"}) by (pod_name, path) / sum(banyandb_system_disk{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod",kind="total"}) by (pod_name, path)

panels.title: Disk Used % by Path

targets.expr: sum(go_goroutines{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}) by (pod_name)

panels.description: Average GC pause duration per node.

targets.expr: sum(rate(go_gc_duration_seconds_sum{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])) by (pod_name) / sum(rate(go_gc_duration_seconds_count{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])) by (pod_name)

panels.title: GC Pause (avg)

targets.expr: sum(go_memstats_heap_inuse_bytes{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}) by (pod_name)

panels.description: Heap next-GC threshold and allocation rate per node.

targets.expr: sum(go_memstats_next_gc_bytes{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}) by (pod_name)
sum(rate(go_memstats_alloc_bytes_total{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])) by (pod_name)

panels.title: Heap Next-GC / Alloc Rate
